content.rendered:
Growing businesses shouldn’t have to juggle different tools for every office. With Attendo, your whole organization comes together under one roof. Whether it’s a headquarters in Texas, a sales team in New York, or dozens of retail outlets across the country — everything stays connected, organized, and easy to manage.

Key Capabilities

Global Context Switcher: Right at the top of your sidebar, you’ll find a branch selector that lets Admins jump between locations in a second. View the “Head Office” to check HQ activity, or switch to any branch to see their own attendance, payroll, and day-to-day details.

Location Metadata: Every branch profile comes with helpful context — like its address (e.g., “Unknown Street, Texas, USA”) and current status — so you always know exactly which location you’re looking at.

Main Branch Tag: Your headquarters stands out with a simple “Main” badge. It’s the parent branch for reports, global settings, and anything that affects the whole organization.

Clean, Segregated Data: Switching branches updates the entire dashboard instantly. You only see the people, logs, and reports that belong to that branch — no clutter, no confusion, just clean, focused data.

How It Powers Your Operations

Unified Reporting: See the bigger picture without losing the details. Compare performance across branches or roll everything up into a clean, company-wide report — whatever your workflow needs.

Localized Compliance: Different locations, different rules? No problem. Each branch can have its own holidays, work-hour policies, or special regulations — perfect for setups like a Factory vs. a Corporate Office.

Role-Based Branch Access: Everyone gets the access that makes sense for their role:

  • Branch Managers stay focused on their own location, with access limited to just their team and data.
  • Super Admins can move freely between all branches.
